# llms-full.txt — Cognitive Engine Graphs (CEG)
# Full resolved documentation for deep agent context sessions.
# Companion to llms.txt. Contains complete inline content — no external refs.

## Identity
- Name: Cognitive Engine Graphs (CEG)
- Type: Domain-configurable graph matching and scoring engine
- Owner: L9 Labs (Igor Beylin / cryptoxdog)
- Repo: https://github.com/cryptoxdog/Cognitive.Engine.Graphs
- Stack: Python 3.12, Neo4j 5.x + GDS, Pydantic v2, FastAPI (chassis only), pytest
- Status: Production — 7 open seL4-upgrade PRs pending merge

## Core Architectural Law
engine/ contains all matching logic. It NEVER imports FastAPI, Starlette, or uvicorn.
chassis/ is the thin HTTP adapter only. It calls engine handlers.
Handlers receive (TenantContext, payload) → dict. No HTTP concerns in engine.

## Request Execution Path
1. HTTP POST /v1/{tenant}/{action} → chassis/routers.py (validates PacketEnvelope)
2. chassis dispatches to engine/handlers.py action handler
3. Handler loads DomainSpec from domains/{domain_id}_domain_spec.yaml
4. DomainSpec drives: gates/ → WHERE clauses, traversal/ → MATCH clauses, scoring/ → WITH+RETURN
5. engine/graph/driver.py executes Cypher against Neo4j (never raw sessions)
6. If feedbackloop.enabled: feedback/convergence.py runs convergence cycle
7. Results returned as dict → chassis serializes to HTTP response

## 8 Action Handlers (engine/handlers.py)
match, sync, admin, outcomes, resolve, health, healthcheck, enrich

## 10 Gate Types (engine/gates/)
Each gate compiles to a Cypher WHERE clause fragment.
All gate types registered in GateType enum.
New gates: extend BaseGate, register in enum, add unit test in tests/unit/gates/.

## 13 Scoring Computation Types (engine/scoring/)
Compile to Cypher WITH clause fragments.
ScoringAssembler.load_learned_weights() multiplies spec_weight × learned_weight.
All scores output clamped to [0.0, 1.0].

## Signal Weight Formula
lift_i = P(positive | dim_i active) / P(positive)
freq_factor_i = sqrt(count_with_dim_i / total_outcomes)
ci_width_i = 1.96 × sqrt(lift_i × (1 - lift_i) / sample_size_i)
confidence_i = 1.0 - min(ci_width_i, 1.0)
weight_i = clamp(1.0 + (lift_i - 1.0) × confidence_i × freq_factor_i, min, max)

## Entity Resolution Similarity
similarity(a,b) = α×property_sim + β×structural_sim + γ×behavioral_sim
property_sim = Jaccard(categorical) + cosine(numeric)
structural_sim = |shared_neighbors| / |union_neighbors|
behavioral_sim = |shared_outcomes| / |union_outcomes|
α + β + γ = 1.0 (configurable per domain)

## 10 Causal Edge Types
CAUSED_BY, TRIGGERED, DROVE, RESULTED_IN, ACCELERATED_BY,
BLOCKED_BY, ENABLED_BY, PREVENTED_BY, INFLUENCED_BY, CONTRIBUTED_TO

## 24 Enforced Contracts
C-001: No raw label interpolation into Cypher
C-002: All queries via GraphDriver.execute_query()
C-003: Engine imports no FastAPI/Starlette/uvicorn
C-004: No PII values in log output
C-005: All caches bounded (TTLCache)
C-006 through C-024: See docs/contracts/ and .claude/rules/contracts.md

## Feature Flags (engine/config/settings.py)
feedback_loop_enabled, kge_enabled (DORMANT), score_clamp_enabled,
causal_enabled, entity_resolution_enabled

## Key Cypher Rules
- Labels: always sanitize_label(spec.targetnode) before f-string interpolation
- Values: always $params — never f-string value interpolation
- Route: always engine/graph/driver.py GraphDriver.execute_query()
- Never: raw async driver sessions, direct bolt calls

## Code Style (enforced)
- Python 3.12+, async/await for all I/O
- Type hints on every function signature
- Pydantic v2 BaseModel for all structured data
- Nullable: x: str | None = None (never Optional)
- Datetime: datetime.now(tz=UTC)
- Logging: structlog.get_logger(__name__)
- Exception message: msg = f"..."; raise ValueError(msg) (avoids ruff EM101)
- Ruff 88-char line length, Black-compatible

## Forbidden Patterns
eval(), exec(), pickle.load(), yaml.load() without SafeLoader,
subprocess with shell=True, unbounded dict caches, FastAPI imports in engine/,
raw Cypher value interpolation, cross-tenant KGE embedding sharing,
PII in any log statement, committing .env files

## Where to Put New Code
New gate type → engine/gates/ + register enum + unit test
New scoring dimension → engine/scoring/ + assembler update
New action handler → engine/handlers.py register_all() + integration test
New HTTP route → chassis/routers.py ONLY
New domain vertical → domains/{id}_domain_spec.yaml
New contract → contracts/ + tools/contract_scanner.py

## Test Layers
tests/unit/ — pure functions, no Neo4j, <100ms total
tests/integration/ — testcontainers-neo4j, requires Docker
tests/compliance/ — prohibited factors blocked at compile time
tests/contracts/ — all 24 contracts
tests/invariants/ — score bounds, weight sums, determinism
tests/property/ — Hypothesis property tests

## Make Commands
make setup         # install deps, pre-commit hooks, verify Neo4j
make dev           # docker-compose up (app + Neo4j + Redis + Prometheus + Grafana)
make test          # full pytest suite
make test-unit     # unit only
make test-integration # integration (Docker required)
make lint          # ruff check + mypy
make cypher-lint   # scan generated Cypher for injection vectors
make coverage      # check coverage thresholds

## Dormant Subsystems
engine/kge/ — CompoundE3D embeddings — kge_enabled=False — do not activate without cross-tenant isolation audit
